name: QA 1475
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1475

Exercise the BPF PMDA CO-RE mountsnoop module - install, remove and values.



Copyright (c) 2022 Sohaib Mohamed.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py fedora-rawhide-container reproduce
